_comment: Release verification policy for cilock binaries, anchored on the TestifySec Platform PKI (NOT public Sigstore). The platform's keyless Fulcio issues the ephemeral code-signing certs and its TSA timestamps the DSSE envelopes; both chain to the single 'TestifySec Platform Root CA'. The policy itself is committed unsigned here so reviewers can read it; the release workflow signs it (DSSE) at publish time and ships the signed copy as release-v1.policy.json. Users verify cilock binaries against the signed copy (cilock verify <artifact> --policy release-v1.policy.json --attestations <bundle>). A cilock built with embedded platform trust (deploy/cilock release pipeline bakes embeddedtrust/trust.json) verifies flaglessly. PEM material here mirrors deploy/cilock/platform-fulcio-root.pem (root, the .certificate) and deploy/cilock/platform-fulcio-intermediate.pem (the issuing Fulcio CA, in .intermediates). NB: the platform leaf signing certs do NOT carry the Fulcio URL as commonName (unlike public Sigstore O=sigstore.dev), so identity is pinned via the Fulcio cert EXTENSIONS (Issuer / SourceRepositoryURI / BuildConfigURI), with commonname:'*' and uris:['*'] AllowAllConstraint sentinels — a literal glob in uris never matches a real cert URI, and omitting uris fails because Fulcio certs always carry a SAN URI (learned on the self-host-minimal rc14/rc15).
_renewal_policy: Bump 'expires' by 6 months on every PR-merged release. If the platform Root CA rotates, re-fetch /api/v1/fulcio/trustbundle, refresh deploy/cilock/platform-fulcio-*.pem, and re-base64 the certificate/intermediates below.
name: cilock-release-v1

platform-testifysec-fulcio._comment: TestifySec Platform PKI. .certificate is the self-signed 'TestifySec Platform Root CA'; .intermediates is the issuing 'TestifySec Platform Fulcio CA'. The keyless leaf cert chains leaf -> Fulcio CA -> Root CA. The leaf carries its issuing intermediate in the DSSE signature too, but pinning it here keeps verification robust if a signer omits it.

platform-testifysec-tsa._comment: TestifySec Platform TSA root. The TSA leaf (CN=TestifySec Platform TSA, EKU=Time Stamping) is issued directly by the Platform Root CA — same root as Fulcio — so .certificate here is identical bytes to roots.platform-testifysec-fulcio.certificate. Mirrors deploy/cilock/platform-tsa-root.pem. Anchors the RFC3161 timestamp on each DSSE envelope, without which the ~20-minute Fulcio cert lifetime would make verify report 'certificate has expired' minutes after signing.

release-build.name: release-build
release-build._comment: Built and signed in .github/workflows/release.yml against the TestifySec Platform (--platform-url). Identity is the GitHub Actions OIDC workflow identity, which the platform Fulcio binds into the ephemeral signing cert's extensions. attestation type URIs use witness.dev/v0.1 for back-compat; cilock's LegacyAlternate aliasing matches them to the aflock.ai attestations it actually emits.
